programme.title: Stranger with My Face
programme.desc: Mystery with Catherine Hicks. A teenager uncovers a series of shocking revelations when she learns she has an identical twin who has been kept secret from her.

programme.title: Out of Order
programme.desc: Otto is waiting for a very important package, but the conveyor belt at the ABDS breaks down.

programme.title: 5ive Days to Midnight
programme.desc: College professor J.T. Neumeyer is visiting his wifes grave with his daughter, Jesse, on the anniversary of her death. Suddenly, out of nowhere, a mysterious briefcase appears. Inside, J.T. finds the details of and newspaper clippings about his own murder, which is, supposedly, going to happen at the stroke of midnight in five days.

programme.title: 5ive Days to Midnight
programme.desc: Physics professor J.T. Neumeyer finds a briefcase that contains a file predicting his own murder in five days.

programme.title: 5ive Days to Midnight
programme.desc: Since the material from the future states that J.T. is going to die in a local nightclub, he decides to leave town before the supposed day of his death arrives.

programme.title: National Lampoons Attack of the 5ft. 2 Woman
programme.desc: Julie Brown stars in two media satires as figure skater Tonya Hardly and as angry wife Lenora Babbitt.

programme.title: Close Up
programme.desc: Exploring the lives and careers of the well-known and famous from the worlds of music and film, these 26-minute long biographical portraits provide a pictorial insight into the background, careers and personal lives of some of the twentieth-centurys best known personalities and iconic faces.

programme.title: Close Up
programme.desc: Exploring the lives and careers of the well-known and famous from the worlds of music and film, these 26-minute long biographical portraits provide a pictorial insight into the background, careers and personal lives of some of the twentieth-centurys best known personalities and iconic faces.

programme.title: Double Wedding
programme.desc: Twin sisters are keen to find dates ahead of a family party. But in a classic case of mistaken identity, they unknowingly date the same man, and invite him to meet the family on the same day.

programme.title: Mystery Woman 3: Sing Me A Murder
programme.desc: Murder is something to sing about when Mystery Woman Samantha Kinsey-an expert in pulp fiction, and increasingly proficient when it comes to real-life crime-untangles a record-breaking murder. Mystery Woman bookshop owner, Samantha Kinsey, has offered to host a charity concert for a once-famous folk-rock trio out to recapture their old fame flame. But sweet success hits the ultimate sour note when the bands promoter is found murdered in his hotel room. Sam and her partner in crime, Philby, investigate, digging up deadly secrets of private indiscretions, professional greed, and personal vengeance that put a twisted spin on fame and fortune-and bring a whole new meaning to a Top Ten hit.

programme.title: Murder Without Conviction
programme.desc: One day after school, Morgan is talking to one of her friends, and the subject of horseback riding comes up. Morgan has never done it before and thinks its easy, so she decides to take some lessons. Simply put, shes horrible. Morgan quits, but the jersey wont let her do that. It transforms her into a gymnist. Domnique Dawes reminds her of how she never gives up after only one try at something. Morgan returns as a new person, and finds a little success the second time around. Meanwhile, Coleman, Nick, and Elliot all need a new pair of shoes, but have absolutely no money. Nicks father, Larry, offers them a job at his office, ""Lighter than Air"". While there, Coleman finds some really cool clothes, Elliot finds office supplies, and Nick builds an enorous sandwich. Obviously, they didnt do their job. However, they meet Jim Harbaugh, star quarterback for the San Diego Chargers (at the time) and Larry lets the three each get a pair of new shoes for no apparent reason.

programme.title: The Inspectors
programme.desc: Addictive series following New Zealands Public Health Officers. A visit to a Chinese restaurant with a history of problems, plus a major rat infestation in one building.

programme.title: Mystery Woman 2: Snapshot
programme.desc: Amateur sleuth Samantha Kinseys latest case has her trying to figure out who killed her best friend Barbara after she was left out of her familys will and every one of the family members become suspects.

programme.title: Ambulance Girl
programme.desc: Comedy drama directed by and starring Kathy Bates. When paralysing phobias threaten the personal and professional life of a food writer (Bates), she decides to venture off in a completely different direction. As a volunteer paramedic, she finally discovers the perfect way to help herself by helping others.

programme.title: A Place Called Home
programme.desc: Tula Jetters (Ann Margret) is a stubborn widow who still mourns the death of her husband from years ago called "The Captain." She lives alone in a big beautiful home by a lake, but her independence may be threatened by the reality of her diminished vision. She has resisted change, including seeing an eye specialist. Her late husbands niece Billie (Hunter Tylo) and nephew Dave (Sean OBryan) have a real estate agency and are now pressuring her to go into assisted living. They have dreams of using her land to make a killing in a big land development. They get a county social worker Jan (Rebecca McFarland) involved in evaluating her independence. Into this mix drops a drifter Henry (Matthew Settle) and his young daughter Cali (Shailene Woodley). Restless Henry becomes a handyman while Cali dreams of having a home here.

programme.title: Snow Queen
programme.desc: After the tragic death of her mother, Gerta and her father continue to run the small inn they call home. For the lonely Gerta, her only joy is her friendship with a handsome young man, Kai. Then one night, an unknown guest arrives at the inn, dressed in furs and diamonds. The next day, she disappears along with Kai.

programme.title: Snow Queen
programme.desc: After the tragic death of her mother, Gerta and her father continue to run the small inn they call home. For the lonely Gerta, her only joy is her friendship with a handsome young man, Kai. Then one night, an unknown guest arrives at the inn, dressed in furs and diamonds. The next day, she disappears along with Kai.

programme.title: The Pledge/A Gunfighters Pledge
programme.desc: Ex-lawman Matt Austin (Luke Perry) accidentally kills an innocent man (Alex Paez) while hunting an outlaw who killed his family. He pledges to the dying man that he will take his body to his sister Amaya (Jaclyn DeSantis). Austin wrestles with the idea of telling her he caused the death, but is faced with bigger battles once at the farm. There he gets involved with land baron Horn (C. Thomas Howell), who is trying to take Amayas land. Their lives are more intertwined than he thought, when he takes on Horn and discovers that Horn has hired the man he was looking for all along.

programme.title: Word of Honor
programme.desc: A corporate exec and family man is accused of participating in a war crime 30 years earlier during the Vietnam War.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Teddy (John Glover) brought about his vision of "The End" when he detonated nuclear warheads across the Texas landscape, but it will be up to those who survived to decide what "The Beginning" will look like. And theyll have to do it in a world devoid of light and hope, where the outside air is just as deadly as the walkers they face. The survivors will find out who they really are and what theyre really made of. Some will rise to the occasion, some will find new purpose, and some will redefine themselves -- even if it comes at a terrible cost to those they once considered family.

programme.title: The Devils Whore
programme.desc: After Angelica Fanshawes country noble mother chooses the Catholic faith over the Anglican law of England, her daughter becomes a royal ward of king Charles I, who allows her love marriage to childhood friend and cousin Harry Fanshawe. But social resistance to the kings absolutism, till then maintained by whip in an iron hand, culminates in a parliamentary rebellion, which spills to utter civil war. It means their utter downfall, Harry being executed because his royalist troops capitulated to military genius Oliver Cromwells while their estate hosts the royal court on permanent flight.

programme.title: The Devils Whore
programme.desc: The people of the besieged city of Oxford are in a desperate situation. Devastated by the Kings brutal betrayal, Angelica has been cast out of court, and finds herself destitute and starving. Meanwhile, divisions are beginning to split the Parliamentarians.

programme.title: 5ive Days to Midnight
programme.desc: J.T. changes tactics by attempting to appease or in some other way prevent anyone with the motive to kill him from getting a chance to do it on the fateful evening.

programme.title: 5ive Days to Midnight
programme.desc: Physics professor J.T. Neumeyer finds a briefcase that contains a file predicting his own murder in five days.

programme.title: Human Trafficking
programme.desc: Disenfranchised by economic catastrophe and the fall of a nation, destitute young women and children are left behind and become prey to the underworld. They are a desirable commodity in a billion dollar industry where human beings are bought and sold. In the Ukraine, sixteen-year-old Nadia (Laurence Leboeuf, The Secret) is seduced by the promises of a modeling agency. She runs away from home and disappears. In Southeast Asia, the vacation of a middle-class American couple turns into a nightmare when their twelve-year-old daughter, Annie (Sarah-Jeanne Labrosse, 15/Love), is kidnapped and sold to a brothel. In Prague, Helena (Isabelle Blais, The Barbarian Invasions), a struggling single mother is swept off her feet by the advances of a wealthy businessman. But its a trap and she too "disappears". In Romania, an orphaned seventeen year old Katerina (Anna Hopkins,Thunderstone) vanishes after meeting her fiance, whom she met online. The horrific destiny of each victim is tied to a sex-trafficking ring. Its the job of Kate Morozov (Oscar and Golden Globe winner Mira Sorvino, Mighty Aphrodite), a detective for Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to help find the men responsible. But first she knows she must win the faith of the victims who have learned firsthand the futility of trust. While Annies parents join forces with Tom Halloran (Terry Haig, The Aviator) and a renegade worker for an NGO, scouting a child-prostitution ring, Nadias grief-stricken father Viktor is embarking on his own personal hunt to find the men responsible. From a torture chamber in the suburbs of Queens to the flesh-peddlers of Russia the hunt is on, revealing a shocking conspiracy of global proportions. Featuring Emmy and Golden Globe winner Donald Sutherland, (The Italian Job) and Robert Carlyle (The Full Monty) Human Trafficking is at once a gripping government procedural, a cautionary tale of an international scourge, and one of the most compulsively important thrillers of the ye

programme.title: Human Trafficking
programme.desc: Human Trafficking is an American crime drama series dealing with the terrible crime of selling people into the sex slave industry. The series follows an American agent, Kate Morozov, as she goes undercover to investigate the cases of dead prostitutes suspecting they are victims of trafficking. Meanwhile, three young women from different parts of the world are forced to become sex workers, as part of the international network led by Sergei Karpovich. Helena, a single mother from Prague has a chance to testify.

programme.title: Close Up
programme.desc: Exploring the lives and careers of the well-known and famous from the worlds of music and film, these 26-minute long biographical portraits provide a pictorial insight into the background, careers and personal lives of some of the twentieth-centurys best known personalities and iconic faces.

programme.title: For Love Alone: The Ivana Trump Story
programme.desc: The triumphs and tragedies of Katrinka Kovár, a young Czechoslovakian ski prodigy who discovers high-society splendor in the arms of a wealthy American businessman. When lust turns to lies, Katrinka--long haunted by a burning secret from her past--sets out to find the love she left behind.

programme.title: Mystery Woman 4: Vision Of A Murder
programme.desc: Sam lands a job photographing a new spa in Southern California for their brochure and brings her best friend Cassie along to enjoy some pampering. When one of the guests staying at the upscale retreat turns up dead, Sam is once again on the trail of a murderer. As the investigation progresses, Sam uncovers a scam that the spa Dr was testing unapproved drugs on the patrons.. filler implants, etc. without the patients informed consent.

programme.title: Ambulance Girl
programme.desc: Comedy drama directed by and starring Kathy Bates. When paralysing phobias threaten the personal and professional life of a food writer (Bates), she decides to venture off in a completely different direction. As a volunteer paramedic, she finally discovers the perfect way to help herself by helping others.

programme.title: Mayflower Madam
programme.desc: Inspired by the explosive sex-for-sale scandal that rocked Manhattan in 1984, the infamous Sydney Biddle Barrows, a driven young socialite, opens an exclusive escort service catering to the wealthy and affluent. From Sydneys rise to become a million-dollar, modern-day madam to her notorious plummet into bankruptcy and public disgrace, experience a private glimpse into the forbidden world of high-class prostitution-where money talks...pleasure sells...and discretion is everything.

programme.title: Mystery Woman 3: Sing Me A Murder
programme.desc: Murder is something to sing about when Mystery Woman Samantha Kinsey-an expert in pulp fiction, and increasingly proficient when it comes to real-life crime-untangles a record-breaking murder. Mystery Woman bookshop owner, Samantha Kinsey, has offered to host a charity concert for a once-famous folk-rock trio out to recapture their old fame flame. But sweet success hits the ultimate sour note when the bands promoter is found murdered in his hotel room. Sam and her partner in crime, Philby, investigate, digging up deadly secrets of private indiscretions, professional greed, and personal vengeance that put a twisted spin on fame and fortune-and bring a whole new meaning to a Top Ten hit.

programme.title: Love is a Four Letter Word
programme.desc: Margaret and Martin Harper, both sixty years old, are filing for divorce, but plan to keep everything as civilized as possible. Complications arise when their respective attorneys, the equally cynical Emily Bennett and Kenton Rhodes, unexpectedly fall in love, throwing an extra kink into the proceedings both in and out of the courtroom.

programme.title: The Inspectors
programme.desc: Addictive series following New Zealands Public Health Officers. A visit to a Chinese restaurant with a history of problems, plus a major rat infestation in one building.

programme.title: Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The free adaptation of Jules Vernes adventure novel takes us to a mysterious island in the Pacific, which seems to be an ideal refuge for deserters on the run. Union captain Cyrus Smith (Kyle MacLachlan), African-American slave Neb (Omar Gooding), widowed sister Jane (Gabrielle Anwar) and her teenage daughter Helen (Danielle Calvert) and two desperate Confederate soldiers already had their teeth full of civil war in their homeland and issued on an adventurous balloon flight into the unknown. They feel they have just found the Promised Land. However, their dream of freedom did not last long. At first glance, the island is inhabited by monsters that give them nothing, and it seems that their only refuge and rescue may be Captain Nemo (Patrick Stewart) and his submarine. The sooner they understand this, the higher their chances of survival ...

programme.title: Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The free adaptation of Jules Vernes adventure novel takes us to a mysterious island in the Pacific, which seems to be an ideal refuge for deserters on the run. Union captain Cyrus Smith (Kyle MacLachlan), African-American slave Neb (Omar Gooding), widowed sister Jane (Gabrielle Anwar) and her teenage daughter Helen (Danielle Calvert) and two desperate Confederate soldiers already had their teeth full of civil war in their homeland and issued on an adventurous balloon flight into the unknown. At first glance, the island is inhabited by monsters that give them nothing, and it seems that their only refuge and rescue may be Captain Nemo (Patrick Stewart) and his submarine. The sooner they understand this, the higher their chances of survival.

programme.title: Desolation Canyon
programme.desc: Western about a sheriff (Dallas star, Patrick Duffy) who persuades his old friend (Stacy Keach, Prison Break), a retired gunslinger, to join himin pursuit of a notorious gang. The band of outlaws counts the gunslingers son as one of its members.

programme.title: The Reading Room
programme.desc: Fulfilling his beloved wifes dying wish, William Campbell restores an abandoned building they own into a reading room for a depressed community notorious for its ineffectual high school and street gangs.

programme.title: To The Ends of The Earth
programme.desc: In 1812, young British aristocrat Edmund Talbot travels by ship to Australia and learns more about himself and about life than he had ever bargained for.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Teddy (John Glover) brought about his vision of "The End" when he detonated nuclear warheads across the Texas landscape, but it will be up to those who survived to decide what "The Beginning" will look like. And theyll have to do it in a world devoid of light and hope, where the outside air is just as deadly as the walkers they face. The survivors will find out who they really are and what theyre really made of. Some will rise to the occasion, some will find new purpose, and some will redefine themselves -- even if it comes at a terrible cost to those they once considered family.

programme.title: Everything She Ever Wanted
programme.desc: Thriller starring Gina Gershon and Ryan McPartlin. Ambitious Southern couple Pat and Tom Allanson aim to rise through the hierarchy of the South Carolina elite.

programme.title: Everything She Ever Wanted
programme.desc: Thriller starring Gina Gershon and Ryan McPartlin. Ambitious Southern couple Pat and Tom Allanson aim to rise through the hierarchy of the South Carolina elite.

programme.title: National Lampoons Attack of the 5ft. 2 Woman
programme.desc: Julie Brown stars in two media satires as figure skater Tonya Hardly and as angry wife Lenora Babbitt.

programme.title: Stranger with My Face
programme.desc: Mystery with Catherine Hicks. A teenager uncovers a series of shocking revelations when she learns she has an identical twin who has been kept secret from her.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Reality series, set in Texas and similar to North Woods Law, that follows daily lives of men and women who are Game Wardens and whose job is to protect deserts, lakes, woods, bayous, coasts and wild animals that live in the second-largest state in the U.S. These people have their plates full as they must deal with poachers, hunters who dont obey the law, smugglers, while they rescue injured wildlife and defend citizens.

programme.title: Im Alive
programme.desc: IM ALIVE features the death-defying and moving stories of people who — regardless of the obstacles or consequences — were determined to survive an animal attack. Driven by thoughts of loved ones and the desire to live, these individuals found the strength to survive terrifying and unexpected encounters by some of natures most dangerous creatures. This inspirational drama combines victim interviews with true-to-life reenactments, giving a replay of the split-second decisions that saved lives. Over the course of 10 episodes, IM ALIVE immerses viewers in the psychological experience of those involved, focusing on what pulled them through and what left them powerfully changed. Every survivor had something to live for, and in that fleeting moment of chaos, their desire for life outshone the attack.

programme.title: Preposterous Pets
programme.desc: In this programme, we delve into the stories of eccentric individuals who have developed a special relationship with unusual, exotic animals, ranging from giant alligators and polar bears to deadly scorpions and wild capybaras. Join us as we set out on a journey across the globe to meet these extraordinary pets and their owners.

programme.title: Guardians Of the Glades
programme.desc: Follow snake hunter Dusty "The Wildman" Crum and his team - Brittany, swamp expert Jay, wildlife specialist Gary, survivalist Tom and Floridas number one python-hunting dog Riley, as they hunt down fearsome snake thats terrorizing Everglades - swamps located on the southernmost tip of Florida, called the Burmese python. This notorious predators that escaped captivity after Hurricane Andrew, quickly multiplied after breeding and feeding on the animals in the Glades. Dusty will take matters into his own hands as he tries to stop these deadly creatures from further destroying the ecosystem.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Follow aquarium enthusiasts Brett Raymer and Wayde King as they attempt to build some of the most luxurious fish tanks in the world. At Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, the brothers-in-law guide you through the design process and the building of their truly jaw-dropping aquariums. Experience the unveiling of finished tanks housed everywhere from restaurants and banks, to glamorous casinos and mansions. Join the duo in their Las Vegas workshop as they deliver some budget-shattering builds to their high-profile clientele.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Houston
programme.desc: Animal Cops - Houston is the third Animal Planet series to follow the work of animal cruelty investigators. This particular series follows the animal cruelty investigators of the Houston Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (HSPCA). This team of 8 investigators works in a large area of Texas investigating reports of animal cruelty and, when necessary, removing animals from horrible abuse situations. Since these investigators do not have arrest or warrant seeking powers on their own, they work closely with local law enforcement, including the Harris County Precinct One Constables Office. This office has permantly assigned Deputy Constable Christine Kendrick to assist the HSPCA investigators with any law enforcement issue that arises, including seeking warrents and arresting those charged with animal cruelty.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Houston
programme.desc: Animal Cops - Houston is the third Animal Planet series to follow the work of animal cruelty investigators. This particular series follows the animal cruelty investigators of the Houston Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (HSPCA). This team of 8 investigators works in a large area of Texas investigating reports of animal cruelty and, when necessary, removing animals from horrible abuse situations. Since these investigators do not have arrest or warrant seeking powers on their own, they work closely with local law enforcement, including the Harris County Precinct One Constables Office. This office has permantly assigned Deputy Constable Christine Kendrick to assist the HSPCA investigators with any law enforcement issue that arises, including seeking warrents and arresting those charged with animal cruelty.

programme.title: Shark Vortex
programme.desc: Each summer the Gulf Stream pushes north into the waters of southern New England, bringing with it thirty species of shark. Greg Skomal and Joe Remeiro study the annual spectacle.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: Alaskan Bush People is an American docudrama-style reality TV series revolving around the Brown family, members of which are trying to survive in the wilderness, far away from the society. Take a journey deep into Alaskas bush, where naturalist and adventurer Billy Brown, along with his wife, Ami, and their seven children, choose to live life on their own terms, connected to wild nature and bonded to each other.

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy is a cat behaviorist. He is the person who resolves conflicts or behavioral issues between the owners and their cats or even between the cats and other pets. These are attacks and misbehavior, and Jackson is a true cat-lover and a believer that any problem can be solved thanks to love, patience and proper handling. Taking good care of cats is a demanding process and a whole science, but in return you will get a loving and purring family member.

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: US reality TV show follows the Irwin family through their adventures in continuing Steve Irwins legacy. The family share their wildlife experiences from their travels across the world. They show how they care for all the animals while giving insight into their family life at Australia Zoo where they live and work. The Australian family including mother Terri who is a naturalist and conservationist stars alongside daughter Bindi and son Robert who are fully immerse in animal life and their family.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the Bronx Zoo, one of the largest zoos in the USA and the largest city zoo the country has to offer. Opening their doors to camera crews, the daily operations of the world-famous animal sanctuary are revealed, as the staff keep their loving creatures healthy and happy. Renowned for its diverse collection of animals and wonderful exhibitions, the Bronx Zoo is one of the finest in the world, home to lions, bears, tigers, snow leopards, baboons, flamingos and many more extravagant species. This series showcases the effort, experience and expertise required to run the Bronx Zoo.

programme.title: Jeremy Wades Dark Waters
programme.desc: Join biologist and angling expert Jeremy Wade as he travels the world peering through our darkest, murky waters, investigating tales of mythical monsters, mutated beasts and depleting fish populations. The star of River Monsters is back to explain the unexplainable, as he investigates these reported sightings of unknown creatures. Whether its Lake Gardas reptilian monster, a species of pike the size of a man, a river monster deemed extinct in the Outback or South Africas fabled half-man, half-fish monster, Jeremy will need to use all of his experience if he is to catch, or even glimpse, these creatures.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet is a TV series entirely dedicated to love and care for animals. Thanks to a genius Dr. Jeff Young Denvers Planned Pethood Plus veterinary clinic is always busy and is taking care of 80,000-plus clients and their pets. Dr. Jeffs sharp surgical skills and his unconditional love for animals make him one of the most respected vets in the country. Dr. Jeff has a dedicated team of more than 30 veterinary staffers and once a month they go to remote locations where people do not have access to vets.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Follow aquarium enthusiasts Brett Raymer and Wayde King as they attempt to build some of the most luxurious fish tanks in the world. At Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, the brothers-in-law guide you through the design process and the building of their truly jaw-dropping aquariums. Experience the unveiling of finished tanks housed everywhere from restaurants and banks, to glamorous casinos and mansions. Join the duo in their Las Vegas workshop as they deliver some budget-shattering builds to their high-profile clientele.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Phoenix
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Phoenix shines a light on the work of the Arizona Humane Society (AHS). The AHS is an agency concentrating on the welfare and protection of Arizonas animal community. On the road with AHS field operations team assist local police services, attend rescue situations and examine cases of suspected animal cruelty. Animal cruelty investigators and Emergency Animal Medical Technicians are on hand to do all they can to help the creatures. Meanwhile, back at the AHS Trauma Hospital, animals receive medical care and behavioural treatment with the hope of finding someone to adopt them.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Phoenix
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Phoenix shines a light on the work of the Arizona Humane Society (AHS). The AHS is an agency concentrating on the welfare and protection of Arizonas animal community. programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: The Vet Life is an amazing series revolving around three friends, three vets, Diarra Blue, Aubrey Ross, and Mike Lavigne and their everyday lives. These guys became friends back in University, then they worked in Las Vegas and finally moved to Texas and opened a full-service veterinary hospital of their own. The series highlights their daily routine, their duties at work and at home, their families and pets.

programme.title: Animal Cribs
programme.desc: American animal TV series with designer Antonio Ballatore own show creating the perfect space for pet owning families. Believing that if dad can have a "man cave" and mum a "she shed" then surely there is such thing as a animal crib?! Antonios passion for design and animals shines through throughout every episode. Joined by project manager Grace and their trusty companion Chewie the Bulldog they produce the most fantastic spaces for both pets and their owners. Pets include Chinchillas, dogs, cats and snakes and possibly many more.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Pit bulls are eager to please, faithful and enthusiastic friends and pleasant with children according to credible canine organizations. But they have fallen from grace. Now often associated with gang members, dog fighting and attacks. Thats about to change. Animal Planet introduces you to this dogs greatest ally, and shes not a man - shes a fiery red-headed leading lady, and shes determined to end the needless hostility toward pit bulls. Meet Tia Maria Torres - 49-year-old mother, top pit bull trainer and founder and owner of Villalobos Rescue Center - the countrys largest rescue facility for pit bulls.

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy is a cat behaviorist. He is the person who resolves conflicts or behavioral issues between the owners and their cats or even between the cats and other pets. These are attacks and misbehavior, and Jackson is a true cat-lover and a believer that any problem can be solved thanks to love, patience and proper handling. Taking good care of cats is a demanding process and a whole science, but in return you will get a loving and purring family member.

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: US reality TV show follows the Irwin family through their adventures in continuing Steve Irwins legacy. The family share their wildlife experiences from their travels across the world. They show how they care for all the animals while giving insight into their family life at Australia Zoo where they live and work. The Australian family including mother Terri who is a naturalist and conservationist stars alongside daughter Bindi and son Robert who are fully immerse in animal life and their family.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet is a TV series entirely dedicated to love and care for animals. Thanks to a genius Dr. Jeff Young Denvers Planned Pethood Plus veterinary clinic is always busy and is taking care of 80,000-plus clients and their pets. Dr. Jeffs sharp surgical skills and his unconditional love for animals make him one of the most respected vets in the country. Dr. Jeff has a dedicated team of more than 30 veterinary staffers and once a month they go to remote locations where people do not have access to vets.

programme.title: Insane Pools Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End is a home improvement show that follows pool designer Lucas Congdon and his team from Lucas Lagoons. Congdon and his crew renovate existing pools and build new ones on residential properties. Thanks to their unbelievable imagination, creativity and professionalism they can turn every pool into an ultimate backyard oasis for a whole family and transform it into a natural lagoon. They prefer working with hand-selected stones from Tennessee.

programme.title: Animal ER
programme.desc: Today at Gulf Coast, Damon, a rescue dog found bleeding and missing a paw, is a candidate for an artificial limb. Dr. Beale gets Damon ready for an operation on his foot to fit the prosthetic limb designed by Animal Prosthetic Maker Bill Bickley. With the new paw, Damons life is transformed and is now enjoying life with his newly adopted family in Colorado. Two African caracal cats, Nova and Starlord, come to Gulf Coast to investigate why the female Nova is having digestion troubles. After a series of tests, Dr. Chen prescribes medications that do the trick - after a week of treatment, Nova is showing signs of improvement by maintaining a healthy appetite and being a playful mate to Starlord. Lucy, a dachshund, is rushed to the ICU and a crushed jaw. Dr. Chanda Miles performs two marathon surgeries, and places steel bone plates to hold the jaw together. Although challenging, the procedure is a success, and Lucy has a shot at recovery. Meanwhile, Emma, a French Bulldog, is brought to the neurology department with paralyzed legs. Dr. Laura Vasquez performs emergency surgery to remove ruptured disc material in hopes of regaining her ability to walk. The procedure is a success and within 24 hours, Emma begins to walk and is expected to make a full recovery. Two sea turtles are driven 200-miles from the Gulf of Mexico to Avian and Exotics to remove a rash of tumors that are growing out of control all over their bodies. Dr. Chen and Danielle help these endangered animals by using a CO2 laser to remove the tumors before they grow so large that they cause paralysis or blindness. Finally, Darth Rachel, a Labrador retriever, is brought to Gulf Coast because of her heavy labored breathing. Dr. Heidi Hottinger performs surgery to permanently hold open the cartilage on one side of her airway. Despite now having a clear airway, Darth Rachel retains her raspy breathing.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: Alaskan Bush People is an American docudrama-style reality TV series revolving around the Brown family, members of which are trying to survive in the wilderness, far away from the society. programme.title: Project Grizzly
programme.desc: The Project Grizzly series follows the trials and tribulations of world renowned bear trainer Jeff Watson as he battles against time to teach his rescued grizzlies the skills and tricks needed for them to survive back in the wild where they truly belong. The domesticated grizzlies Bob and Screech learn to live outside the cage, to fish, to hunt and to live in the wild. Raised by him since cubs, Jeffs decision is not only emotionally charged but emotive in the message it gives of a fathers love to do the best for his young.

programme.title: Intruders
programme.desc: If you thought you were safe at home, think again! Wild creatures and other pests who should be living outdoors make their way into your house on Animal Planets new series, INTRUDERS. The series reveals real-life stories of homeowners fighting back to reclaim their homes when theyve been invaded by snakes, over-run with rats, crawling with cockroaches and broken into by bears, among other invasions

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: ATM has been so busy they could use a glass of wine. Good thing their next tank is on a vineyard. CEO of Jordan Winery wants a beautiful reef tank to live on his winery. After all, whats better than sipping on a Merlot and watching the ocean? Wayde and Brett need to make this happen before harvest season but thats not Jordans only request. He wants a second tank for a brand new preschool. Two tanks mean double the expectations and double the trouble. ATM might be whining about this one.

programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy is a cat behaviorist. He is the person who resolves conflicts or behavioral issues between the owners and their cats or even between the cats and other pets. These are attacks and misbehavior, and Jackson is a true cat-lover and a believer that any problem can be solved thanks to love, patience and proper handling. Taking good care of cats is a demanding process and a whole science, but in return you will get a loving and purring family member.

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: US reality TV show follows the Irwin family through their adventures in continuing Steve Irwins legacy. The family share their wildlife experiences from their travels across the world. They show how they care for all the animals while giving insight into their family life at Australia Zoo where they live and work. The Australian family including mother Terri who is a naturalist and conservationist stars alongside daughter Bindi and son Robert who are fully immerse in animal life and their family.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet is a TV series entirely dedicated to love and care for animals. Thanks to a genius Dr. Jeff Young Denvers Planned Pethood Plus veterinary clinic is always busy and is taking care of 80,000-plus clients and their pets. Dr. Jeffs sharp surgical skills and his unconditional love for animals make him one of the most respected vets in the country. Dr. Jeff has a dedicated team of more than 30 veterinary staffers and once a month they go to remote locations where people do not have access to vets.

programme.title: Insane Pools Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End is a home improvement show that follows pool designer Lucas Congdon and his team from Lucas Lagoons. Congdon and his crew renovate existing pools and build new ones on residential properties. Thanks to their unbelievable imagination, creativity and professionalism they can turn every pool into an ultimate backyard oasis for a whole family and transform it into a natural lagoon. They prefer working with hand-selected stones from Tennessee.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: The Last Alaskans chronicles the daily rituals of four families choosing to live in seclusion, vast distances from each other as they overcome harsh arctic conditions, frustrating setbacks, and aggressive wildlife while they survive in one of the last great unspoiled and unforgiving wildernesses on the planet. In the refuge, prop planes, canoes and dog sleds replace the modern luxuries that most people take for granted. Humans cohabit with the animal world and often share the same emotions and struggles while they discover that they are not necessary at the top of the food chain. Utilizing an authentic and organic approach to document the weeks leading up to and during the winter season, The Last Alaskans sets a distinctive and vibrant tone unlike any other docu-series before to completely immerse the viewer into a world that would otherwise be lost in history.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: Alaskan Bush People is an American docudrama-style reality TV series revolving around the Brown family, members of which are trying to survive in the wilderness, far away from the society. Take a journey deep into Alaskas bush, where naturalist and adventurer Billy Brown, along with his wife, Ami, and their seven children, choose to live life on their own terms, connected to wild nature and bonded to each other.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Reality series, set in Texas and similar to North Woods Law, that follows daily lives of men and women who are Game Wardens and whose job is to protect deserts, lakes, woods, bayous, coasts and wild animals that live in the second-largest state in the U.S. These people have their plates full as they must deal with poachers, hunters who dont obey the law, smugglers, while they rescue injured wildlife and defend citizens.

programme.title: Im Alive
programme.desc: IM ALIVE features the death-defying and moving stories of people who — regardless of the obstacles or consequences — were determined to survive an animal attack. Driven by thoughts of loved ones and the desire to live, these individuals found the strength to survive terrifying and unexpected encounters by some of natures most dangerous creatures. This inspirational drama combines victim interviews with true-to-life reenactments, giving a replay of the split-second decisions that saved lives. Over the course of 10 episodes, IM ALIVE immerses viewers in the psychological experience of those involved, focusing on what pulled them through and what left them powerfully changed. Every survivor had something to live for, and in that fleeting moment of chaos, their desire for life outshone the attack.

programme.title: Deadly Islands
programme.desc: Renowned zoologist, animal trainer, and television presenter Dave Salmoni is no stranger to adventure. Having trekked the globe to study creatures and their unique ecosystems, Dave has walked the line between the wild and human world to explore the delicate balance between wildlife and civilization. From the people behind the stunning natural history series, PLANET EARTH and NORTH AMERICA, DEADLY ISLANDS sees Daves skills tested to the limits as he lives alongside some of Mother Natures fiercest predators. Dave visits some of the worlds most remote islands to investigate how and why their native inhabitants have been so spectacularly successful at surviving - despite the harshest of conditions. In a unique approach that blends all the splendour of a natural history documentary series with an incredible investigative twist, audiences follow Dave as detective while he sets out to crack some of the last big secrets surrounding some of the worlds most successful natural-born killers. Only by venturing closer than most would dare to some of the planets most dangerous animals-from the great hammerhead shark to the grizzly bear. Can Dave uncover their secrets. How have they come to thrive so spectacularly in these remote places, often in confined island settings? Daves skills will be tested to the limits as he lives alongside some of Mother Natures fiercest predators, on some of the worlds most remote islands,all to solve the DEADLY ISLANDS.

programme.title: Intruders
programme.desc: If you thought you were safe at home, think again! Wild creatures and other pests who should be living outdoors make their way into your house on Animal Planets new series, INTRUDERS. The series reveals real-life stories of homeowners fighting back to reclaim their homes when theyve been invaded by snakes, over-run with rats, crawling with cockroaches and broken into by bears, among other invasions

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Follow aquarium enthusiasts Brett Raymer and Wayde King as they attempt to build some of the most luxurious fish tanks in the world. At Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, the brothers-in-law guide you through the design process and the building of their truly jaw-dropping aquariums. Experience the unveiling of finished tanks housed everywhere from restaurants and banks, to glamorous casinos and mansions. Join the duo in their Las Vegas workshop as they deliver some budget-shattering builds to their high-profile clientele.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Phoenix
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Phoenix shines a light on the work of the Arizona Humane Society (AHS). The AHS is an agency concentrating on the welfare and protection of Arizonas animal community. On the road with AHS field operations team assist local police services, attend rescue situations and examine cases of suspected animal cruelty. Animal cruelty investigators and Emergency Animal Medical Technicians are on hand to do all they can to help the creatures. Meanwhile, back at the AHS Trauma Hospital, animals receive medical care and behavioural treatment with the hope of finding someone to adopt them.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Phoenix
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Phoenix shines a light on the work of the Arizona Humane Society (AHS). The AHS is an agency concentrating on the welfare and protection of Arizonas animal community. programme.title: Tech Now
programme.desc: Tech Now explores the latest innovations and technologies shaping our lives.

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. This world renowned news and current affairs program has been recognised for its exceptional reporting at the Emmy Awards. BBC World News America won two Emmy awards for its coverage of the conflicts in Syria and the Central African Republic. You can catch up with this award winning broadcast team as they air multiple times a day throughout the week.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: In-depth news and current affairs review of the main political and economic stories of the day, featuring robust interviews with senior government and opposition figures, business and union leaders, and analytical reports that delve behind the headlines. Regular presenters cross-examine studio guests on details of policies, priorities, actions and inactions, on a range of domestic UK and international topics. There are weekly features on the arts, sports and the world of technology, and editors are not afraid to venture into niche, specialist and exotic areas from space travel to animal psychology. If the BBCs flagship Radio 4 Today programme sets the early morning news agenda for the day, then its late-night TV equivalent often gives the people in power some sleepless nights.

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. This world renowned news and current affairs program has been recognised for its exceptional reporting at the Emmy Awards. BBC World News America won two Emmy awards for its coverage of the conflicts in Syria and the Central African Republic. You can catch up with this award winning broadcast team as they air multiple times a day throughout the week.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC,which is designed to inform you on current affairs. The BBC is aims to be a totally impartial public service broadcaster, and was established by Royal Charter. The BBC is funded by a licence fee paid by British households, and is regulated by Ofcom. They aim to create high-quality content, in order to inform and educate, but also entertain, their audience Millions of people from all over the world watch content produced by the BBC, and they are well respected as a media company. It was founded in 1922, with its headquarters in Westminster, London.

programme.title: Newscast
programme.desc: Join BBC journalists including political editor Laura Kuenssberg, Europe editor Katya Adler, Brussels correspondent Adam Fleming and political correspondent Chris Mason in their weekly podcast discussing all of the news stories that matter to the people of the United Kingdom. The journalists know all about the stories that theyre talking about - they interview the most important people involved in the stories that feature in the news. They speak of their knowledge and understanding of the news in a way that is understandable for all. Laura is often in a car in the middle of a city where big politics stories are happening. Katya, Adam and Chris are usually in the studio. They regularly talk about Brexit and what is going to happen when the United Kingdom leaves the European Union.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC,which is designed to inform you on current affairs. They aim to create high-quality content, in order to inform and educate, but also entertain, their audience Millions of people from all over the world watch content produced by the BBC, and they are well respected as a media company. It was founded in 1922, with its headquarters in Westminster, London.

programme.title: Newsday
programme.desc: "Good Morning Asia, hello World." Join the news teams from BBC World News in London and Singapore. This live news and current affairs program is broadcast globally and focuses on all the latest news and breaking developing stories that matter around the world. The show is usually presented by Rico Hizon in Singapore and Kasia Madera in London. Broadcasting live at midnight GMT on both BBC World News and the BBC News channel, the show is broadcast in the morning in Asia and therefore is marketed as a morning show for people watching around the country. The show is often followed by Asia Business Report live from Singapore which reports on all the latest economy and business figures from the country.

programme.desc: The latest business news from Singapore and around the world.

programme.desc: A round-up of the days sporting action.

programme.title: Focus on Africa
programme.desc: Focus on Africa is a BBC news program broadcast globally and on local partner channels of the BBC in African countries. The program used to be presented by Komla Dumor each weekday from its inception until his death in 2014; now it is hosted by Sophie Ikenye, a news presenter from Kenya. The program includes news, sport and business from across Africa and the rest of the globe. Get the top African stories and keep up with the latest international events.

Broadcasting live at midnight GMT on both BBC World News and the BBC News channel, the show is broadcast in the morning in Asia and therefore is marketed as a morning show for people watching around the country. The show is often followed by Asia Business Report live from Singapore which reports on all the latest economy and business figures from the country.

programme.desc: The latest business news from Singapore and around the world.

programme.title: The Travel Show

programme.title: Focus on Africa
programme.desc: Focus on Africa is a BBC news program broadcast globally and on local partner channels of the BBC in African countries. The program used to be presented by Komla Dumor each weekday from its inception until his death in 2014; now it is hosted by Sophie Ikenye, a news presenter from Kenya. The program includes news, sport and business from across Africa and the rest of the globe. Get the top African stories and keep up with the latest international events.

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. This world renowned news and current affairs program has been recognised for its exceptional reporting at the Emmy Awards. BBC World News America won two Emmy awards for its coverage of the conflicts in Syria and the Central African Republic. You can catch up with this award winning broadcast team as they air multiple times a day throughout the week.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: In-depth news and current affairs review of the main political and economic stories of the day, featuring robust interviews with senior government and opposition figures, business and union leaders, and analytical reports that delve behind the headlines. Regular presenters cross-examine studio guests on details of policies, priorities, actions and inactions, on a range of domestic UK and international topics. There are weekly features on the arts, sports and the world of technology, and editors are not afraid to venture into niche, specialist and exotic areas from space travel to animal psychology. If the BBCs flagship Radio 4 Today programme sets the early morning news agenda for the day, then its late-night TV equivalent often gives the people in power some sleepless nights.

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. Совершенно случайно в зоне взрыва оказываются три человека: преступник Владимир Голенко, фотохудожник Олег Малинин и неудачливый писатель Венедикт Тартаковский. В результате взрыва между этими людьми возникает странная связь – фотограф Малинин может читать мысли преступника Голенко, и даже видеть окружающий мир его глазами, а писатель Тартаковский может полностью управлять действиями Голенко и при этом общаться с Малининым на расстоянии. Тартаковский, получив в свое полное распоряжение преступника Голенко, решает его руками отомстить всем, кто мешал ему в жизни. Город захлестывает череда кровавых преступлений...

programme.title: Почта
programme.desc: В почтовое отделение на должность экспедитора устраивается Елена (40 лет). Экспедитор Андрей (45) не очень доволен новой напарницей, он не доверяет женщинам за рулем. Но со временем между Еленой и Андреем возникает симпатия. И не без стараний со стороны их детей – Юли и Глеба. Андрей – одинокий папа, Елена - одинокая мама, казалось бы, ничего не может помешать их отношениям… Но тайны и ошибки прошлого сыграют с ними злую шутку… Бушуют страсти и в почтовом отделении. Руководитель отделения Артем (30) покоряет вершины почтовой карьеры и не желает замечать сотрудницу отделения Милану (25), которая мечтает заполучить его сердце. Мама Артема и его младший брат Гена также вносят в жизнь отделения свои коррективы… Все герои ежедневно сталкиваются с нестандартными ситуациями, но не остаются равнодушными к проблемам людей-клиентов почтового отделения, помогая им выпутаться из сложных историй…

programme.title: Почта
programme.desc: В почтовое отделение на должность экспедитора устраивается Елена (40 лет). Экспедитор Андрей (45) не очень доволен новой напарницей, он не доверяет женщинам за рулем. Но со временем между Еленой и Андреем возникает симпатия. И не без стараний со стороны их детей – Юли и Глеба. Андрей – одинокий папа, Елена - одинокая мама, казалось бы, ничего не может помешать их отношениям… Но тайны и ошибки прошлого сыграют с ними злую шутку… Бушуют страсти и в почтовом отделении. Руководитель отделения Артем (30) покоряет вершины почтовой карьеры и не желает замечать сотрудницу отделения Милану (25), которая мечтает заполучить его сердце. Мама Артема и его младший брат Гена также вносят в жизнь отделения свои коррективы… Все герои ежедневно сталкиваются с нестандартными ситуациями, но не остаются равнодушными к проблемам людей-клиентов почтового отделения, помогая им выпутаться из сложных историй…

programme.title: Отважные
programme.desc: Сериал рассказывает о работе специального подразделения полиции, занимающегося проблемами домашнего насилия. Четыре главные героини помогают женщинам, детям и даже мужчинам, страдающим от тирании, побоев, унижений и других способов угнетения со стороны близких людей. Героини сериала будут попадать в сложные и опасные ситуации, спасая жизни и восстанавливая справедливость. Каждая женщина из этой четверки тоже прошла через насилие: у каждой – своя история, скелет в шкафу и сильная мотивация заниматься именно этим делом.

programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. Совершенно случайно в зоне взрыва оказываются три человека: преступник Владимир Голенко, фотохудожник Олег Малинин и неудачливый писатель Венедикт Тартаковский. В результате взрыва между этими людьми возникает странная связь – фотограф Малинин может читать мысли преступника Голенко, и даже видеть окружающий мир его глазами, а писатель Тартаковский может полностью управлять действиями Голенко и при этом общаться с Малининым на расстоянии. Тартаковский, получив в свое полное распоряжение преступника Голенко, решает его руками отомстить всем, кто мешал ему в жизни. Город захлестывает череда кровавых преступлений...

programme.title: Горячая точка
programme.desc: Сотрудники полиции участвуют во всех особо важных делах – спасении заложников и переговорах с террористами, эвакуации жителей и обезвреживании бомб, охоте на серийного убийцу и даже решении семейных конфликтов. В арсенале у участников ГСР (группы стратегического реагирования) не только высокотехнологичное оружие, но еще и быстрый ум, интуиция и… багаж собственных проблем и травм, которые часто влияют на их работу.

programme.title: Горячая точка
programme.desc: Пока сержанта Паркера временно отстраняют от службы, Группа Один получает срочный вызов на фармацевтический завод, где производят вакцину от сибирской язвы. Джулс оказывается заперта в одном из помещений с вооружённым человеком и заложниками, а внутри начинает распространяться опасный вирус. Сэму предстоит принять судьбоносное решение, которое повлияет не только на исход операции, но и на их с Джулс будущее в команде.

programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. Совершенно случайно в зоне взрыва оказываются три человека: преступник Владимир Голенко, фотохудожник Олег Малинин и неудачливый писатель Венедикт Тартаковский. В результате взрыва между этими людьми возникает странная связь – фотограф Малинин может читать мысли преступника Голенко, и даже видеть окружающий мир его глазами, а писатель Тартаковский может полностью управлять действиями Голенко и при этом общаться с Малининым на расстоянии. Тартаковский, получив в свое полное распоряжение преступника Голенко, решает его руками отомстить всем, кто мешал ему в жизни. Город захлестывает череда кровавых преступлений...

Андрей – одинокий папа, Елена - одинокая мама, казалось бы, ничего не может помешать их отношениям… Но тайны и ошибки прошлого сыграют с ними злую шутку… Бушуют страсти и в почтовом отделении. Руководитель отделения Артем (30) покоряет вершины почтовой карьеры и не желает замечать сотрудницу отделения Милану (25), которая мечтает заполучить его сердце. Мама Артема и его младший брат Гена также вносят в жизнь отделения свои коррективы… Все герои ежедневно сталкиваются с нестандартными ситуациями, но не остаются равнодушными к проблемам людей-клиентов почтового отделения, помогая им выпутаться из сложных историй…

programme.title: Отважные
programme.desc: Сериал рассказывает о работе специального подразделения полиции, занимающегося проблемами домашнего насилия. Четыре главные героини помогают женщинам, детям и даже мужчинам, страдающим от тирании, побоев, унижений и других способов угнетения со стороны близких людей. Героини сериала будут попадать в сложные и опасные ситуации, спасая жизни и восстанавливая справедливость. Каждая женщина из этой четверки тоже прошла через насилие: у каждой – своя история, скелет в шкафу и сильная мотивация заниматься именно этим делом.

programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. Совершенно случайно в зоне взрыва оказываются три человека: преступник Владимир Голенко, фотохудожник Олег Малинин и неудачливый писатель Венедикт Тартаковский. В результате взрыва между этими людьми возникает странная связь – фотограф Малинин может читать мысли преступника Голенко, и даже видеть окружающий мир его глазами, а писатель Тартаковский может полностью управлять действиями Голенко и при этом общаться с Малининым на расстоянии. Тартаковский, получив в свое полное распоряжение преступника Голенко, решает его руками отомстить всем, кто мешал ему в жизни. Город захлестывает череда кровавых преступлений...

programme.title: Контакт

programme.title: Горячая точка
programme.desc: Сотрудники полиции участвуют во всех особо важных делах – спасении заложников и переговорах с террористами, эвакуации жителей и обезвреживании бомб, охоте на серийного убийцу и даже решении семейных конфликтов. В арсенале у участников ГСР (группы стратегического реагирования) не только высокотехнологичное оружие, но еще и быстрый ум, интуиция и… багаж собственных проблем и травм, которые часто влияют на их работу.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons are a totally normal family. Dad is your regular 6"4 pink rabbit who stays at home while Mom works in a rainbow factory. Their kids are pretty standard too - theres Gumball, a blue cat with a giant head, Anais, a 4 year old genius bunny, and Darwin, a pet goldfish that became part of the family when he sprouted legs. At the heart of the show is Gumball, who faces the trials and tribulations of any twelve-year-old kid - like being chased by a rampaging T-Rex, sleeping rough when a robot steals his identity, or dressing as a cheerleader and doing the splits to impress the girl of his dreams. Simple everyday issues weve all been through. Gumballs hometown of Elmore is every bit as commonplace… a cactus waters his front lawn, a furry slug drives to work, and on the corner a balloon, a potato and a ghost all wait for the school bus. Welcome to The Amazing World of Gumball, where normal just got a little bit weird…

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons must survive a bizarre game of Dodj or Daar through to the end. / Darwin has promised to play video games with Gumball but his promise with Banana Joe interferes. / Gumball and Darwin must apologise to everyone they know after getting a threatening message on Elmore Plus. / Gumball and Darwin try to understand Jukes urgent beatbox message. / Richard is left in charge for the day but his lack of rules attracts unwanted guests to the Watterson house. / Gumball and Darwin fail to make some instant homemade movie classics. / Gumball and Darwins reputation is challenged and they really couldnt care less... / Gumball accidentally uploads a video of himself and wants it gone. / The Watterson kids come up with a fool-proof plan.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin try to get a game back from Tobias but Darwin starts to feel like a sidekick to Gumball and refuses to follow his orders. / Richard overhears Gumball and Darwin making fun of him which hurts his feelings and he has to regain his reputation as a hero. / Gumball tries to look good in the school photo. / Gumball and Darwin get caught in the middle of a trash can war between Richard and Mr. Robinson. / Gumball and Darwin cheat on their maths test get detention and have to escape. / Nicole gets upset with the family at the supermarket when her kids want chocolate but she says no. / The Wattersons must survive a bizarre game of Dodj or Daar through to the end. / Darwin has promised to play video games with Gumball but his promise with Banana Joe interferes.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The shows so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Starfire, Cyborg, Beast Boy and Raven continue the fun in season seven of TEEN TITANS GO! with all-new comedic adventures, giving viewers a look at what life is really like as a teen super hero ... once the cape comes off. Inspired by and featuring the principal voice cast of the original Teen Titans series, this character-driven comedy - based upon DC characters - focuses on the funny that happens in between saving the world and living together as teenagers without adult supervision. With epic staring contests to decide who does the laundry, a series of quests and battles to construct the perfect sandwich or fighting crime in Jump City, one thing is for sure - these Titans are always ready for an adventure, inside the house and out.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Starfire, Cyborg, Beast Boy and Raven continue the fun in season seven of TEEN TITANS GO! with all-new comedic adventures, giving viewers a look at what life is really like as a teen super hero ... once the cape comes off. Inspired by and featuring the principal voice cast of the original Teen Titans series, this character-driven comedy - based upon DC characters - focuses on the funny that happens in between saving the world and living together as teenagers without adult supervision. With epic staring contests to decide who does the laundry, a series of quests and battles to construct the perfect sandwich or fighting crime in Jump City, one thing is for sure - these Titans are always ready for an adventure, inside the house and out.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP. While out on their usual exploration, the Stump Kids find a hidden underground bunker called Founders Keep and deduce that it belonged to the first group of kids to play in the Creek from as far back as 1976. As they find it strange that the kids would leave their things behind, Craig discovers a letter written in secret code that might explain their abandoned hideout.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Craig and his two best friends, Kelsey and JP, are always going on adventures in the untamed suburban wilderness known as the Creek - a kid utopia where tribes of children rule over tree forts and bike ramps, making up an entire kid society. Each episode finds the kids either venturing into unexplored areas of the Creek, encountering new Creek Kids, or just getting into trouble at their hang out - the Stump.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP. When Craig gets annoyed at how Kelsey and JP do not respect his things, he seeks out the Keeper of Secrets to have his secret about how they sometimes annoy him kept in his lair. When a flood washes all the Creek Kids secrets out, the Stump Kids collect them all... and Eliza finds one secret that she threatens to have read out loud at an auction.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP. When Craig accidentally destroys Kits entire supply of red velvet Chocorolls, he has to pay her back by making trades for her throughout the day. He must first sell some lame headgear, then get a certain sour snack from the Ninja Kids for the Elders, and finally get a very bland granola bar from the Junk Lord... or rather, his wild junk cats.

programme.title: Lana Longbeard
programme.desc: Lana is a super-feisty, forward-thinking and passionate 11-year-old girl, who is also the heir to her fathers adventuring ship, the Mighty Windbreaker. Along with her captain dad and his diverse crew (an orc, a dwarf, a barbarian and a cyclops), she sails across the Ten Realms, dreaming of becoming one of the greatest adventurers of all time. But first, she must overcome some challenging obstacles: impulsivity, stubbornness, extreme curiosity, disdain for rules … and a love of pancakes. All the best things about her!

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The shows so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The shows so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons are a totally normal family. Dad is your regular 6"4 pink rabbit who stays at home while Mom works in a rainbow factory. Their kids are pretty standard too - theres Gumball, a blue cat with a giant head, Anais, a 4 year old genius bunny, and Darwin, a pet goldfish that became part of the family when he sprouted legs. At the heart of the show is Gumball, who faces the trials and tribulations of any twelve-year-old kid - like being chased by a rampaging T-Rex, sleeping rough when a robot steals his identity, or dressing as a cheerleader and doing the splits to impress the girl of his dreams. Simple everyday issues weve all been through. Gumballs hometown of Elmore is every bit as commonplace… a cactus waters his front lawn, a furry slug drives to work, and on the corner a balloon, a potato and a ghost all wait for the school bus. Welcome to The Amazing World of Gumball, where normal just got a little bit weird…

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Starfire, Cyborg, Beast Boy and Raven continue the fun in season seven of TEEN TITANS GO! with all-new comedic adventures, giving viewers a look at what life is really like as a teen super hero ... once the cape comes off. Inspired by and featuring the principal voice cast of the original Teen Titans series, this character-driven comedy - based upon DC characters - focuses on the funny that happens in between saving the world and living together as teenagers without adult supervision. With epic staring contests to decide who does the laundry, a series of quests and battles to construct the perfect sandwich or fighting crime in Jump City, one thing is for sure - these Titans are always ready for an adventure, inside the house and out.

programme.title: Clarence
programme.desc: Follow the daily adventures of a 10-year-old boy named Clarence, and his two best friends Sumo and Jeff. Clarence lives with his mother Mary and her boyfriend Chad in the fictional town of Aberdale, and he is optimistic, curious, honest and quirky boy, who sees the best in everyone and gets himself in a variety of funny situations and everyday problems, which he solves with lots of imagination and with the help from his friends.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP. The Tea Timers throw a dance and invite everyone in the Creek, but while JP and Maney get ready together, Craig believes that the party is a ruse to get back at him as revenge. Meanwhile, Aaron asks out Kelsey and she reluctantly accepts - while Aaron is nice, Kelsey does not want to hurt his feelings as she is not romantically in love with him.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP. The Stump Kids come across an underground bunker made of cardboard and courtesy of Carter Brown - recruiting Zoe, they head down and discover that Carter has been trying to make up for his past misdeeds by bettering himself. However, this involves transforming himself into a "card-borg" and attacking his former allies in an induced rage.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP. While out on their usual exploration, the Stump Kids find a hidden underground bunker called Founders Keep and deduce that it belonged to the first group of kids to play in the Creek from as far back as 1976. As they find it strange that the kids would leave their things behind, Craig discovers a letter written in secret code that might explain their abandoned hideout.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: Penny wants to ask Gumball to the Elmore Jr High Prom, but when Gumballs expectations for an extra romantic and extra complicated gesture become way more than Penny can handle, Penny must find a way to deliver.

programme.title: Goat Girl
programme.desc: Gigi, raised by mountain goats, attends boarding school at 13. Having had minimal human contact, this marks her first real exposure to society, prompting overseers Nanny and Billy to push her to spread her wings among people versus goats.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Adventure Time is an American fantasy animated television series that shows a 12-year-old boy Finn and his best friend, a wise 28-year-old (in dog years) dog Jake with magical powers living in Lands of Ooo in post-apocalyptic world. They lean on each other during good and bad times, trust each another with secrets and look to each other for advice. Finn likes to travel and save princesses from evil monsters in Lands of Ooo. Jake is more than his friend, he is his mentor, and his extraordinary skills help the boy to fight evil. Finn and Jake hang out with Princess Bubblegum, the sovereign of the Candy Kingdom, the fearsome Ice King, an ice wizard, Marceline the Vampire Queen, a 1000-year-old vampire and rock musician and many more.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin accidentally create a loveable monster that eats their family. / Anais arrives in the bedroom to find a messy crime-scene and her Daisy doll missing. She realises Gumball and Darwin are the chief suspects. / A mysterious figure from Nicoles past shows up and challenges her to a fight, but the kids are surprised when she refuses. / A compilation of some of the funniest, most bizarre clips uploaded onto the internet by the people of Elmore. / When Rob purchases a universal remote from the Awesome Store he discovers he can control the universe. He rewinds into the past and remembers Gumball had left him in The Void. / When we last saw Gumball he was hitting rewind on Robs Universal Remote just in time to save himself from being trapped in The Void. / Gumball and Darwin go to extreme lengths to help Molly make her dull stories more interesting. / Anais has made a new friend, so Gumball and Darwin immediately assume there must be something wrong with him. / Gumball and Darwin think its one of those days when nothing interesting is happening. But as they walk around Elmore it appears exciting things are happening just not to them. 1

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The shows so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The shows so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Starfire, Cyborg, Beast Boy and Raven continue the fun in season seven of TEEN TITANS GO! with all-new comedic adventures, giving viewers a look at what life is really like as a teen super hero ... once the cape comes off. Inspired by and featuring the principal voice cast of the original Teen Titans series, this character-driven comedy - based upon DC characters - focuses on the funny that happens in between saving the world and living together as teenagers without adult supervision. With epic staring contests to decide who does the laundry, a series of quests and battles to construct the perfect sandwich or fighting crime in Jump City, one thing is for sure - these Titans are always ready for an adventure, inside the house and out.

With epic staring contests to decide who does the laundry, a series of quests and battles to construct the perfect sandwich or fighting crime in Jump City, one thing is for sure - these Titans are always ready for an adventure, inside the house and out.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Adventure Time is an American fantasy animated television series that shows a 12-year-old boy Finn and his best friend, a wise 28-year-old (in dog years) dog Jake with magical powers living in Lands of Ooo in post-apocalyptic world. They lean on each other during good and bad times, trust each another with secrets and look to each other for advice. Finn likes to travel and save princesses from evil monsters in Lands of Ooo. Jake is more than his friend, he is his mentor, and his extraordinary skills help the boy to fight evil. Finn and Jake hang out with Princess Bubblegum, the sovereign of the Candy Kingdom, the fearsome Ice King, an ice wizard, Marceline the Vampire Queen, a 1000-year-old vampire and rock musician and many more.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Adventure Time is an American fantasy animated television series that shows a 12-year-old boy Finn and his best friend, a wise 28-year-old (in dog years) dog Jake with magical powers living in Lands of Ooo in post-apocalyptic world. They lean on each other during good and bad times, trust each another with secrets and look to each other for advice. Finn likes to travel and save princesses from evil monsters in Lands of Ooo. Jake is more than his friend, he is his mentor, and his extraordinary skills help the boy to fight evil. Finn and Jake hang out with Princess Bubblegum, the sovereign of the Candy Kingdom, the fearsome Ice King, an ice wizard, Marceline the Vampire Queen, a 1000-year-old vampire and rock musician and many more.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai the blue jay and Rigby the raccoon hate having to do work as groundskeepers at the local park, trying to slack off whenever they can. When they have simple problems to solve, they often lead to a surreal, extreme, and often supernatural misadventures. Usually this makes their boss, Benson (a gumball machine) extremely angry and on the verge to fire them and annoys their coworker, Skips (a yeti, voiced by Mark Hamill). The pair are always saved by the other manager/owner Pops (a man with a lollipop-shaped head) as he enjoys their constant antics. Co-workers Muscle-Man (an overweight, green man) and Hi-Five Ghost sometimes get involved in the shenanigans, but usually find a way out and leave Mordecai and Rigby in the firing line.
